creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175502
rpi patch

New patch:
 - option'ify rpi (rpi1 built with default compiler flags, rpi2 built with -march=armv7a -mtune=cortex-a7 -mfpu=neon)

build logs:
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/kodi-16.1_rpi1.log
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/kodi-16.1_rpi2.log

I've started to work on crochet to generate FreeBSD image with kodi on it:
https://github.com/MikaelUrankar/crochet/tree/kodi_armv6

One can generate an image by issuing "crochet.sh -c config_kodi_rpi1.sh" or "crochet.sh -c config_kodi_rpi2.sh"
A valid repo is mandatory, you'll need to modify KODI_REPO in config_kodi_rpi*.sh
